name: Install SSL Proxy On-Start
description: Installs a drop-in script that handles nginx reverse proxy setup and iptables rules on each container start.

parameters.name: SSL Mode
parameters.description: SSL mode: proxy (nginx), native (app handles HTTPS), or certs (certificates only)

parameters.name: Alpine Mirror
parameters.description: Alpine Linux mirror URL for package installation

parameters.name: Debian Mirror
parameters.description: Debian/Ubuntu mirror URL for package installation

commands.description: Create and run SSL proxy on-start drop-in script
